an1.235:1.1: "Foremost among my *bhikkhuni* disciples, *bhikkhus*, in seniority is Mahāpajāpatigotamī.
an1.242:1.1: … In the divine eye is Bakulā.
an1.243:1.1: … In swift direct knowledge is Bhaddā Kuṇḍalakesā.
an1.244:1.1: … In recollecting past lives is Bhaddā Kāpilānī.
an1.245:1.1: … In attaining great direct knowledge is Bhaddākaccānā.
an1.246:1.1: … In wearing coarse robes is Kisāgotamī.
